text: the dmv lady told me to take a new photo and i somehow looked worse the second time
my apartment ghost keeps turning on the bathroom light at 3am. at least someone cares about my sleep schedule
microwave fish at work again today. no regrets
took the wrong exit and ended up in a town that still has a blockbuster
i have receipts from 2019 in my wallet. i dont know why i keep them but i cant stop
told my date i was "into fitness" and then couldnt open the pickle jar at dinner
my laundry has been in the washer for 3 days. its basically a science experiment now
answered a spam call and it was actually my dentist. still hung up
burnt rice so bad the smoke detector filed a noise complaint
left a note on the office fridge that said 'i know what you did to my yogurt, karen'
my phone died at 2% in the parking garage and i wandered for 40 minutes looking for my car
googled 'is it normal to talk to your houseplants' at 2am. the answer is yes btw
the dmv number system skipped from 47 to 103. nobody questioned it
went on a date and she asked me what my credit score was before the appetizers came
someone in my building plays the recorder at midnight. badly. every thursday
put my whites in with a red sock again. everything i own is pink now
my phone was at 1% and i had to choose between calling an uber or googling directions. chose wrong
the parking garage has 7 levels and i forget which one every single time
reheated fish in the office microwave. the fire alarm went off. worth it
my apartment makes a noise at exactly 3:17am every night. its not the pipes. ive checked
waited 4 hours at the dmv and they told me i was in the wrong line
first date showed up with a sword. like a real one. i stayed for dessert tho
googled 'can you eat cheese thats been out overnight' more times than ill admit
the ghost in apt 4b keeps flushing the toilet. at least its polite
left my laundry in the communal dryer and someone folded it. im scared
took the wrong exit and somehow ended up in another state. twice this month
my office has a microwave graveyard of forgotten tupperware. mine is in there somewhere
phone died mid argument over text. they probably think i rage quit
parked on level 3. or was it level 5. or the roof. who knows
the dmv photo made me look like a wanted criminal. maybe i am now
date went so bad the waiter gave ME a sympathy dessert
someone microwaved popcorn for 10 minutes. the whole floor smells like regret
my search history is 90% 'how to adult' and 10% 'is my landlord allowed to do that'
the laundromat ate my quarters and my will to live
heard footsteps above me. i live on the top floor
phone hit 5% at the grocery store. speedran my shopping like it was olympic trials
my parking spot got stolen by a smart car. i drive a truck. it fit diagonally
dmv worker went on lunch break mid-sentence while helping me
first date asked if i believed in simulation theory then cried into his soup
put detergent in the dryer and fabric softener in the wash. clothes smell confused
googled 'why does my apartment smell weird' and webmd said i might be haunted
someone left a passive agressive smiley face on my parking job. it was a good parking job
the office microwave has seen things. horrible things. mostly my leftovers
my date pronounced quinoa as 'kwin-oh-ah' and i just let it happen
phone died while using it as a flashlight in the parking garage. stood in the dark for 5 min
apartment ghost moved my keys again. third time this week
the dmv smells like broken dreams and expired air freshener
someone at work heats up curry at 8am. respect the audacity tbh
googled 'how to tell if your roommate is a vampire' at 4am. inconclusive results
left a note saying 'your music is too loud' and got a note back saying 'no'
my dryer shrunk my favorite shirt. or i grew. im choosing to believe the dryer
phone at 3% and uber driver is 8 minutes away. this is how i die
took the scenic route home and ended up at a gas station in the middle of nowhere for 2 hrs
dmv lady asked me to smile for the photo. i was smiling
date brought their mom. she ordered for both of them
the washing machine in the basement sounds like its summoning something
someone microwaved a hard boiled egg at work. it exploded. meeting cancelled
googled 'can anxiety make you hear footsteps' and now im more anxious
parked so far from the entrance i basically hiked to the store
my apartment walls are so thin i know my neighbor's netflix password by sound
first date brought a powerpoint about why we're compatible. slide 7 was concerning
the dmv has a vibe that no amount of fluorescent lighting can fix
washed my headphones again. third pair this year. its april
phone died during google maps navigation. drove by instinct. arrived at wendys
office fridge has something growing in it. we've named it gerald
heard singing from the empty apartment next door at 2am. lease says its been vacant 6 months
my date said 'i dont believe in tipping' and i excused myself to the bathroom forever
left a note on the microwave: 'if you reheat fish you will be judged'. someone reheated fish
parking garage elevator broke. walked 6 flights of stairs. legs still dont work
dmv website said wait time was 20 min. that was 3 hours ago
googled 'do ghosts use electricity' bc my electric bill makes no sense
put fabric softener where the bleach goes. everything is soft and slightly ruined
phone battery icon turned red and my heart rate doubled
someone double parked behind me and left a note saying 'brb 5 min'. that was yesterday
heated up leftover spaghetti at work. microwave looked like a crime scene after
date asked what my 5 year plan was. i dont even have a 5 minute plan
the shadow in my hallway moved. im blaming the streetlight and not investigating further
dmv made me retake the eye test 3 times. i can see fine. probably
accidentally washed my work badge. had to explain to security why im damp
googled 'is it rude to leave a date early' while on the date. she saw my screen
parking garage at the mall has no cell service. its basically a tomb
office microwave caught fire last tuesday. we still used it on wednesday
my neighbor slides notes under my door rating my cooking smells. last one said 4/10
phone died while i was reading a recipe. guessed the oven temp. house smells bad now
the dmv chairs are designed to make you question every life decision
lost my car in the parking garage and pretended to be on the phone while searching
date showed up 45 min late and said 'sorry i was manifesting'. left immediately
woke up to my laundry in a pile on top of the dryer. the laundry room has no cameras
googled 'can your boss legally make you stay late' during a meeting. on the big screen
my apartment door opens by itself sometimes. landlord says its 'character'
brought my own lunch to avoid the microwave situation. someone still judged my sandwich
phone was at 8% and i had to choose between spotify and gps. chose spotify. got lost
dmv appointment was at 10am. got seen at 1:47pm. they acted like that was normal
found a sock from 2 loads ago stuck to my fitted sheet. laundry is chaos
the thing in the walls is back. its either a mouse or a demon. either way im moving
someone left a note on my car saying 'nice parking' and i genuinely cant tell if its sarcasm
googled 'weird smell in apartment' and one result was 'you might have a ghost'. cool
heated soup without a lid. microwave looks like a jackson pollock now
my date told me mercury was in retrograde as an excuse for being rude to the waiter
phone at 1%. sent 'im here' to my uber driver. phone died. stood in the rain
the parking garage stairwell echoes so bad i scared myself with my own footsteps
